question: Network Interface Card (NIC)
canonical_answer:
"Multi-port repeater"
• Traffic going in one port is repeated to every other port

Everything is half-duplex
Becomes less efficient as network speeds increase
10 megabit / 100 megabit
Difficult to find today

appears_in.title: Mike Meyers Comptia Videos
appears_in.answer: A utility for migrating data from many computers, or if you need to perform what Microsoft calls a "wipe-and-load migration" from and to the same computer. Available in Windows XP, Vista, and Windows 7. (9)
